prompt: An adult female in a shaded woodland setting in a relaxed squatting position. Framed tightly from just above the head to the upper thighs. Face is in the upper-left center; the torso crosses diagonally through the middle; bent legs form a large curved foreground shape in the bottom third. Body is three-quarters toward the right; the face turns back toward the camera. A calm, slightly contemplative expression—lips slightly parted, eyes soft and focused. Character: Slender natural athletic build, light warm-toned skin, delicate facial proportions, almond-shaped dark brown eyes, soft brow shape, straight delicate nose bridge, subtle rosy lip color. Minimalist makeup: smooth glowing skin, soft brown eyeliner, natural lashes, light peach blush, satin-textured nude rose lipstick. Real pores, fine facial texture, natural under-eye details, gentle tonal transitions; no plastic-like retouching. Hairstyle: Dark brownish-black hair tied in a loose, slightly messy low bun at the back of the head. Natural crown volume, with wisps of hair at the forehead, temples, ears, and nape; a few damp-looking locks fall beside the cheeks. Casual and slightly voluminous—as if affected by humidity or a gentle breeze. Delicate flyaway hairs catch the ambient light. Pose and Hands: Left elbow rests on the raised knee in the lower left. The left hand cradles the face and side of the jaw—fingers gently touching the cheek and temple. The right arm crosses diagonally downward across the center, resting naturally on the opposite leg. Shoulders relaxed, torso leaning slightly forward. Accurate human anatomy, real joints, natural finger spacing, and a genuine sense of contact with the face and legs. Swimwear: beige halter bikini with an irregular oval and circular blue dot pattern. Top: thin halter straps, softly ruched triangle cups, natural fabric tension at the bust. Matte, lightweight, slightly textured—real seams and folds. Matching bikini bottoms sit low on the hips with the same spotted pattern. Small silver metal rings or circular hardware details are visible on the outer hips. Opaque, well-fitting, fashion-editorial feel; not shiny or exaggerated. Legs: One bent thigh prominent across the lower-left foreground; the other bent knee across the lower center and right. Natural perspective—the nearest leg is slightly larger than the torso. Real knee contours, soft muscle lines, natural skin folds at the waist and hips, with fine highlights on the shoulders, arms, and thighs. Scene: Dense shaded forest or tropical garden. Dark green vegetation, blurred leaves, thin twigs, vines, blurred tree trunks. A few light-colored diagonal branches cross behind her shoulders and head—out of focus, used for framing without distracting. Deep, organic, slightly damp feel. No buildings, paths, signs, or people. Depth of Field: Extremely shallow. Eyes/face/upper torso/nearest arm are sharp and clear; vegetation and twigs dissolve into soft creamy bokeh. The nearest knee and bottom edge of the frame are slightly softer than the face. Background: Layered deep olive green, forest green, charcoal gray, understated brown. Lighting: Soft natural daylight filtered through overhead vegetation, shining from the upper left and front left. Gently illuminates the forehead, nose bridge, lips, cheekbones, shoulders, collarbones, upper arms, and knees. Exquisite highlights on slightly dewy skin—especially on the right shoulder and upper arm. Soft, detailed shadows under the jaw, hair strands, arms, and torso. No harsh direct sunlight or flash. Tones and Atmosphere: Warm beige, understated blue, soft skin tones, deep forest green, charcoal brown, restrained gray. Gentle cinematic grading: slightly cool green shadows, neutral highlights, low to medium saturation, smooth highlight transitions, refined contrast. Intimate, quiet, sensual yet dignified, contemplative. Camera: Seated eye-level, full-frame 85mm, f/1.8–f/2.2. Natural perspective compression, precise focus on eyes, exquisite background separation, refined portrait texture. Slight analog film grain, gentle edge softening, exquisite highlight halation. Negative: No text, no logo, no watermark, no extra people, no strong flash, no deformed limbs, no extra fingers, no duplicate body parts, no transparent fabric, no exaggerated proportions, no oversaturated colors, no artificial HDR, no plastic skin.

promptZh: 一位 成年女性 在 阴凉林地 环境中呈放松的蹲姿。构图紧凑，从头顶上方到大腿上部。面部位于左上方中心；躯干呈对角线穿过画面中部；弯曲的双腿在底部三分之一处形成一个巨大的弧形前景。身体向右侧转动四分之三；面部回眸看向镜头。表情平静，略带沉思——双唇微启，眼神柔和而专注。人物特征：身材苗条，自然运动型体格，浅暖色调皮肤，精致的面部比例，杏仁状深棕色眼睛，柔和的眉形，笔挺精致的鼻梁，淡淡的玫瑰色唇色。极简妆容：光滑透亮的皮肤，柔和的棕色眼线，自然的睫毛，浅桃色腮红，缎面质感的裸玫瑰色唇膏。真实的毛孔，细腻的面部纹理，自然的眼下细节，柔和的色调过渡；无塑料感的后期修饰。发型：深棕黑色头发在脑后扎成一个松散、略显凌乱的低发髻。头顶自然蓬松，额头、太阳穴、耳边和颈后有碎发；几缕看起来微湿的发丝垂在脸颊旁。随意且略显蓬松——仿佛受到湿气或微风的影响。精致的飞散发丝捕捉着环境光。姿势与手部：左肘支撑在左下方的抬起的膝盖上。左手轻托脸部和下颌侧面——手指轻轻触碰脸颊和太阳穴。右臂向中心对角线下垂，自然地搭在另一条腿上。肩膀放松，躯干略微前倾。准确的人体解剖结构，真实的关节，自然的手指间距，以及与脸部和腿部接触的真实感。泳装：米色挂脖比基尼，带有不规则椭圆形和圆形蓝色圆点图案。上装：细挂脖肩带，柔软的褶皱三角杯，胸部有自然的织物张力。哑光、轻盈、略带纹理——真实的接缝和褶皱。配套的比基尼底裤低腰穿在胯部，带有相同的圆点图案。胯部外侧可见小巧的银色金属环或圆形五金细节。不透明，合身，具有时尚杂志大片感；不反光，不夸张。腿部：一条弯曲的大腿在左下角前景中突出；另一条弯曲的膝盖横跨左下中心和右侧。自然的透视——最近的腿比躯干略大。真实的膝盖轮廓，柔和的肌肉线条，腰部和臀部自然的皮肤褶皱，肩膀、手臂和大腿上有细腻的高光。场景：茂密的阴凉森林或热带花园。深绿色植被，模糊的叶片，细树枝，藤蔓，模糊的树干。几根浅色的对角树枝在她的肩膀和头部后方穿过——失焦，用于构图而不喧宾夺主。深邃、有机、略带潮湿的感觉。没有建筑物、小路、标志或行人。景深：极浅。眼睛/面部/上躯干/最近的手臂清晰锐利；植被和树枝融化成柔和奶油般的虚化效果。最近的膝盖和画面底部边缘比面部略微柔和。背景：层叠的深橄榄绿、森林绿、炭灰色、低调的棕色。光影：柔和的自然日光透过上方植被过滤，从左上方和左前方照射。柔和地照亮额头、鼻梁、嘴唇、颧骨、肩膀、锁骨、上臂和膝盖。微湿的皮肤上有精致的高光——尤其是在右肩和上臂。下颌、发丝、手臂和躯干下方有柔和、细腻的阴影。无强烈的直射阳光或闪光灯。色调与氛围：暖米色、低调蓝、柔和肤色、深森林绿、炭棕色、克制的灰色。柔和的电影级调色：略带冷绿的阴影，中性高光，低至中等饱和度，平滑的高光过渡，精致的对比度。亲密、安静、感性而庄重，沉思。相机：坐姿平视，全画幅 85mm，f/1.8–f/2.2。自然的透视压缩，精准对焦于眼睛，出色的背景分离，精致的肖像质感。轻微的胶片颗粒感，柔和的边缘柔化，精致的高光晕影。负面提示：无文字，无标志，无水印，无额外人物，无强闪光灯，无畸形肢体，无多余手指，无重复身体部位，无透明织物，无夸张比例，无过饱和色彩，无人工 HDR，无塑料感皮肤。
